function.description: Look around your current location. See who is here, enemies, items on the ground, and resources.
function.name: observe

function.description: Check your own state: HP, satiation, hydration, fatigue, stress, happiness, inventory, equipment, gold, skills, and relationships.
function.name: check_self

function.description: Learn about a nearby NPC — their mood, profession, visible needs, and your relationship with them.
function.name: inspect_person

name.description: Name of the person to inspect

function.description: Search your recent memories. Optionally filter by a topic/keyword or category (routine, combat, economic, social, employment, miracle, dream, education, faction).
function.name: recall_memories

topic.description: Optional keyword or topic to filter memories by

category.description: Optional category filter: routine, combat, economic, social, employment, miracle, dream, education, faction

function.description: Scout a location you know about — see its resources, who is there, and travel time from your current position.
function.name: check_location

location_id.description: ID of the location to check

function.description: List all actions available to you right now, with durations and location options.
function.name: list_actions

function.description: Commit to performing an action. This ends your turn — you will be busy until the action completes.
function.name: commit_action

target.description: Name of a nearby NPC if the action involves one

dialogue.description: What you say, if the action is social or involves speaking

location.description: Location name from the @ list, if the action has location options

reason.description: Brief reason for choosing this action (1 short sentence)
